title: From now on I will delete comments I can't respond to

enrichment.summary: Kyle announces that going forward he will delete any comments he cannot reply to, because YouTube has restricted his ability to respond to comments without explanation. He frames this as a way to preserve his integrity as someone who always responds to every comment.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Fair and necessary to maintain his rule of responding to every comment
Frustrated and plans to contact YouTube to find out why, notes no warning email this time
